parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount intended to be collected by this PaymentIntent. A positive integer representing how much to charge in the [smallest currency unit](https://docs.stripe.com/currencies#zero-decimal) (e.g., 100 cents to charge $1.00

parameters.name: amount_details
parameters.description: Provides industry-specific information about the amount.

parameters.name: application_fee_amount
parameters.description: The amount of the application fee (if any) that will be requested to be applied to the payment and transferred to the application owner's Stripe account. The amount of the application fee collected will be capped at the

parameters.name: capture_method
parameters.description: Controls when the funds will be captured from the customer's account.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Three-letter [ISO currency code](https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html), in lowercase. Must be a [supported currency](https://stripe.com/docs/currencies).

parameters.name: customer
parameters.description: ID of the Customer this PaymentIntent belongs to, if one exists.  Payment methods attached to other Customers cannot be used with this PaymentIntent.  If [setup_future_usage](https://api.stripe.com#payment_intent_object-

parameters.name: customer_account
parameters.description: ID of the Account representing the customer that this PaymentIntent belongs to, if one exists.  Payment methods attached to other Accounts cannot be used with this PaymentIntent.  If [setup_future_usage](https://api.stri

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: An arbitrary string attached to the object. Often useful for displaying to users.

parameters.name: excluded_payment_method_types
parameters.description: The list of payment method types to exclude from use with this payment.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded.

parameters.name: hooks
parameters.description: Automations to be run during the PaymentIntent lifecycle

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Set of [key-value pairs](https://docs.stripe.com/api/metadata) that you can attach to an object. This can be useful for storing additional information about the object in a structured format. Individual keys can be unset

parameters.name: payment_details
parameters.description: Provides industry-specific information about the charge.

parameters.name: payment_method
parameters.description: ID of the payment method (a PaymentMethod, Card, or [compatible Source](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/payment-methods/transitioning#compatibility) object) to attach to this PaymentIntent. To unset this field to null,

parameters.name: payment_method_configuration
parameters.description: The ID of the [payment method configuration](https://docs.stripe.com/api/payment_method_configurations) to use with this PaymentIntent.

parameters.name: payment_method_data
parameters.description: If provided, this hash will be used to create a PaymentMethod. The new PaymentMethod will appear in the [payment_method](https://docs.stripe.com/api/payment_intents/object#payment_intent_object-payment_method) property o

parameters.name: payment_method_options
parameters.description: Payment-method-specific configuration for this PaymentIntent.

parameters.name: payment_method_types
parameters.description: The list of payment method types (for example, card) that this PaymentIntent can use. Use `automatic_payment_methods` to manage payment methods from the [Stripe Dashboard](https://dashboard.stripe.com/settings/payment_me

parameters.name: receipt_email
parameters.description: Email address that the receipt for the resulting payment will be sent to. If `receipt_email` is specified for a payment in live mode, a receipt will be sent regardless of your [email settings](https://dashboard.stripe.co

parameters.name: setup_future_usage
parameters.description: Indicates that you intend to make future payments with this PaymentIntent's payment method.  If you provide a Customer with the PaymentIntent, you can use this parameter to [attach the payment method](/payments/save-duri

parameters.name: shipping
parameters.description: Shipping information for this PaymentIntent.

parameters.name: statement_descriptor
parameters.description: Text that appears on the customer's statement as the statement descriptor for a non-card charge. This value overrides the account's default statement descriptor. For information about requirements, including the 22-chara

parameters.name: statement_descriptor_suffix
parameters.description: Provides information about a card charge. Concatenated to the account's [statement descriptor prefix](https://docs.stripe.com/get-started/account/statement-descriptors#static) to form the complete statement descriptor th

parameters.name: transfer_data
parameters.description: Use this parameter to automatically create a Transfer when the payment succeeds. Learn more about the [use case for connected accounts](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/connected-accounts).

parameters.name: transfer_group
parameters.description: A string that identifies the resulting payment as part of a group. You can only provide `transfer_group` if it hasn't been set. Learn more about the [use case for connected accounts](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/conn
